name: silan
description: Silan Microelectronics ( ) is one of China's leading integrated circuit design and manufacturing companies, specializing in power semiconductors, MEMS sensors, LED drivers, and mixed-signal ICs. With vertically integrated manufacturing capabilities, Silan provides high-quality semiconductor solutions for consumer electronics, industrial control, and new energy applications.
longDescription: Founded in 1997 and headquartered in Hangzhou, China, Silan Microelectronics has grown to become one of the largest and most comprehensive semiconductor companies in China. The company operates state-of-the-art 5-inch, 6-inch, and 8-inch wafer fabrication facilities, as well as advanced packaging and testing capabilities. Silan's product portfolio spans power semiconductors (IGBTs, MOSFETs, IPMs), MEMS sensors, LED drivers, power management ICs, and mixed-signal integrated circuits. The company serves diverse markets including consumer electronics, home appliances, industrial automation, new energy vehicles, and renewable energy systems. As an authorized Silan distributor, LiTong Electronics provides comprehensive technical support, competitive pricing, and reliable supply chain services for Silan's extensive product range.

coreProducts.description: AC-DC converters, DC-DC converters, and voltage regulators for various power applications

faqs.decisionGuide: Contact us to verify our distributor credentials or request a quotation for Silan products.

faqs.question: What are Silan's main product categories?
faqs.answer: Silan Microelectronics specializes in four main product categories: (1) Power Semiconductors - including IGBTs, power MOSFETs, and intelligent power modules (IPMs) for motor control and power conversion applications. (2) MEMS Sensors - accelerometers, gyroscopes, pressure sensors, and microphones for motion detection and environmental monitoring. (3) LED Drivers - comprehensive portfolio of LED driver ICs for general lighting, display backlighting, and automotive lighting applications. (4) Power Management ICs - AC-DC converters, DC-DC converters, and voltage regulators for various power supply applications. Silan's vertically integrated manufacturing ensures high quality and cost-effectiveness.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our product categories or contact our FAE team for product recommendations based on your application.

faqs.question: How is the quality of Silan products?
faqs.answer: Silan maintains high quality standards across all product lines: (1) Certifications - ISO 9001 quality management, ISO 14001 environmental management, and IATF 16949 automotive quality certifications. (2) Automotive qualification - AEC-Q101 qualified products for automotive applications. (3) Manufacturing excellence - vertically integrated manufacturing from wafer fabrication to packaging with advanced 5-inch, 6-inch, and 8-inch fabs. (4) Quality control - comprehensive testing and reliability verification. (5) Market recognition - widely adopted by leading domestic and international brands. Silan's products are known for excellent performance-to-price ratio and reliable supply.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request quality certifications and reliability reports for specific product families.

faqs.question: What industries does Silan serve?
faqs.answer: Silan serves four major industry segments: (1) Consumer Electronics - providing power management, sensors, and drivers for smartphones, tablets, wearables, and home entertainment systems. (2) Home Appliances - motor control solutions for air conditioners, refrigerators, washing machines, and kitchen appliances. (3) Industrial Control - power semiconductors and drivers for motor drives, inverters, PLCs, and automation equipment. (4) New Energy - IGBT modules and power devices for solar inverters, EV charging stations, and energy storage systems. Silan's diverse product portfolio enables comprehensive solutions across these industries.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for industry-specific application support and reference designs.

faqs.question: What technical support does LiTong provide for Silan products?
faqs.answer: LiTong provides comprehensive technical support for Silan products: (1) Product selection - helping choose the right Silan components for your application requirements. (2) Application circuit design - reviewing and optimizing circuit designs using Silan components. (3) PCB layout guidance - providing recommendations for optimal layout and thermal management. (4) Motor control algorithm support - assisting with FOC and other control algorithms. (5) Debugging assistance - troubleshooting issues during prototype bring-up and testing. (6) Reference designs - sharing proven circuit topologies and design examples. (7) Cross-reference support - helping migrate from other brands to Silan alternatives. Our FAE team has extensive experience with Silan products across multiple industries.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for technical support and application guidance.

faqs.question: How can I request samples or get a quotation for Silan products?
faqs.answer: You can request samples or quotations through multiple channels: (1) Online form - submit your inquiry through our website contact form with your application details. (2) Email - send your requirements including part numbers, quantities, and application information to our sales team. (3) Phone - call our customer service hotline for immediate assistance. (4) WeChat - add our official WeChat account for quick communication. For sample requests, please provide project information, estimated annual usage, and technical requirements. Our team responds to inquiries within 24 hours during business days and can provide technical consultation for component selection.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact us today to request samples or get a quotation for your Silan product needs.
